title: EyPipes
description: A mod that adds pipes and few erbs you can plant, dry, ferment and smoke!
body:
# 🌿 EyPipes - A Smoking Pipe Mod for Minecraft

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.1-brightgreen)
![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-21.1.83+-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)

## 📖 Overview

EyPipes is a comprehensive Minecraft mod that adds a complete smoking pipe experience with custom crops, drying mechanics, and beautiful visual effects. Grow your own herbs, dry them properly, craft various pipes, and enjoy relaxing smoke effects with unique benefits!

## 🌟 Main Features

### 🌾 Custom Crops
- **Erbapipa**: A 2-block tall tobacco-like crop with 8 growth stages
- **Valeriana**: A calming herb that provides relaxation effects
- **Ginseng**: An energizing herb that boosts your abilities
- Each crop has unique growth mechanics and harvest requirements

### 🏚️ Processing & Crafting
- **Drying Racks**: Dry your fresh herbs to prepare them for use
- **Cutting Boards**: Process dried herbs into cuttable forms
- **Tobacco Jars**: Store your processed herbs safely
- **Herb Bundles**: Combine herbs for enhanced effects

### 🚬 Beautiful Pipes
- **9 Unique Pipe Styles**: From classic wooden to elegant meerschaum
- **3 Pipe Types**: Bent, Briar, and Calabash variations
- **Cigars**: For those who prefer rolled tobacco
- **Animated Smoking**: Beautiful particle effects and animations
- **Wearable Support**: Equip pipes in head slots with Curios integration

### ✨ Visual Effects
- **Realistic Smoke**: Dynamic particle effects that follow player movement
- **Growth Animations**: Visual feedback when crops grow
- **Custom Models**: High-quality 3D models for all items and blocks
- **Sound Effects**: Immersive audio for smoking and crafting

## 🎮 Gameplay Mechanics

### Growing Your Herbs
1. **Plant seeds** on tilled soil like regular crops
2. **Wait for growth** - crops grow through multiple stages
3. **Harvest mature crops** for maximum yield
4. **Dry the harvest** on drying racks (requires sunlight by default)
5. **Cut and process** dried herbs on cutting boards
6. **Craft your pipe** and enjoy!

### Smoking Effects
- **Erbapipa**: Classic smoking experience with visual effects
- **Valeriana**: Provides calming effects (Slowness + Night Vision)
- **Ginseng**: Energizing effects (Speed + Haste boost)
- **Duration**: Effects last based on herb quality and type

### Compatibility & Integration
- **JEI/REI/EMI Support**: View all recipes in your favorite recipe viewer
- **Curios Integration**: Wear pipes as accessories
- **Compostable**: All plant items can be composted
- **Fortune Compatible**: Use Fortune tools for better harvests

## 📦 Installation

### Requirements
- **Minecraft**: 1.21.1
- **NeoForge**: 21.1.83 or newer
- **Java**: 21 or newer
- **Optional**: Curios API for wearable pipes

### Installation Steps
1. **Download NeoForge** for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. **Download EyPipes** from the releases page
3. **Place the mod file** in your `mods` folder
4. **Launch Minecraft** with the NeoForge profile
5. **Enjoy your new pipe experience!**

## ⚙️ Configuration

EyPipes includes a comprehensive configuration system that lets you customize almost every aspect of the mod:

### Key Configuration Options
- **Crop Growth Rates**: Adjust how fast plants grow
- **Drying Times**: Control how long herbs take to dry
- **Drop Rates**: Customize harvest yields and Fortune effects
- **Performance Settings**: Optimize for your system
- **Visual Effects**: Toggle particles and animations
- **Integration Toggles**: Enable/disable mod compatibility

### Quick Configuration
- Edit `config/eypipes-config.json` in any text editor
- Use `/eypipes reload` in-game to apply changes without restarting
- All settings include helpful descriptions and valid value ranges

For detailed configuration help, see [CONFIG_GUIDE.md](CONFIG_GUIDE.md)

## 🔧 Development Status

### 🎯 Planned Features
- Reviewing all the textures

## 🤝 Contributing

We welcome contributions from the community! Here's how you can help:

### Bug Reports
- Report issues on our GitHub repository
- Include your Minecraft version, mod version, and error logs
- Provide steps to reproduce the issue

### Feature Suggestions
- Share your ideas for new pipes, herbs, or mechanics
- Explain how your suggestion would enhance the mod
- Consider balance and compatibility with other mods

### Code Contributions
- Fork the repository and create a feature branch
- Follow the existing code style and patterns
- Test your changes thoroughly
- Submit a pull request with detailed description

---

## 🌿 Enjoy Your Pipes!

Thank you for trying EyPipes! We hope this mod adds a relaxing and enjoyable element to your Minecraft experience. Whether you're a casual player who enjoys the aesthetic appeal or a serious farmer looking to optimize your herb production, EyPipes has something for everyone.

*Happy smoking, and may your harvests be plentiful!* 🚬✨
